data.title: Study: ChatGPT traffic, sales referrals still trail traditional digital channels
data.description: Organic LLM (oLLM) traffic underperformed every traditional channel except paid social media across key financial metrics such as conversion rate, average order value and revenue per session, according to the study.

data.title: GigaCloud to buy furniture distributor New Classic for $18 million
data.description: New Classic, a 25-year-old company based in Fontana, California, distributes furniture to more than 1,000 retailers across North America and generates $70 million in annual revenue.

data.title: NRF: Consumers to return almost $850 billion in merchandise in 2025
data.description: National Retail Federation and Happy Returns data shows retailers expect consumers to return 15.8% of the merchandise they purchase in 2025.

data.title: Essendant makes a full pivot toward digital commerce
data.description: The Deerfield, Illinois-based company has decided to exit the independent office products dealer channel.

data.title: Alibaba expands consumer AI strategy
data.description: The Quark AI Chat Assistant, launched Oct. 23, introduces a conversational mode powered by Alibaba’s Qwen3 large language models within the Quark app.
